narrative:
Precinct St Clairsville 4-A (precinct in Belmont County) has 482 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
